description_long: This is a compact, stylish backpack made from textured red leather, featuring a rounded top and a structured silhouette. The front displays a gold 'MICHAEL KORS' logo above a row of gold square studs, adding a bold decorative accent. The backpack has two main zippered compartments with gold hardware, and a small front pocket, all with prominent, chunky zippers. The back is plain except for four gold D-rings, likely for attaching or adjusting the shoulder straps. The top has a sturdy leather handle for hand carrying, and the sides show the thickness and construction of the bag. The overall design is both fashionable and functional, suitable for urban environments.
description: A red leather backpack with gold hardware, front gold studs, and a 'MICHAEL KORS' logo, featuring multiple zippered compartments and a structured, stylish design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gold 'MICHAEL KORS' logo, gold square studs, and two main zippered compartments.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness of the bag, the side profile of the zippers, and a small side pocket.
description_view_2: Back view reveals four gold D-rings and the plain red leather back panel, with the top handle visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the dual zippers and the side construction, mirroring the left side without a visible pocket.
attribute_brand_logo: Gold 'MICHAEL KORS' text logo centered on the upper front panel, medium size, sans-serif font, no additional symbols.
attribute_strap_design: Two adjustable leather shoulder straps attached with gold D-rings, and one short leather top handle; straps are medium width and unpadded.
attribute_zipper_placement: One zipper on the main compartment (top, horizontal), one zipper on the secondary front compartment (horizontal), and one zipper on the small front pocket (horizontal).
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment, one secondary front compartment, one small front pocket, and one small side pocket on the left.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold square studs arranged in a grid on the lower front panel, and gold hardware throughout.
